message:
feat(tests): add 38 property tests for extension_validation and theme

21 proptests for extension_validation (normalize_github_repo idempotence/lowercase/
git stripping, canonical_id_from_npm prefix/lowercase, classify_from_evidence
logic, classify_source_content invariants, build_classification_reason signal
coverage, ValidationStatus serde, days_to_ymd valid ranges, is_leap rules,
chrono_now_iso format)

17 proptests for theme (parse_hex_color valid/invalid/case-insensitive/trimming,
looks_like_theme_path classification, is_light luminance threshold, Theme serde
roundtrips, resolve_theme_path absolute/relative handling)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
